nodes.label: JSON-As-Text Database Pattern
nodes.rationale: Several structured values stored as JSON strings in text columns (Resume.parsed_resume, InterviewSession.messages, CareerCoachMemory.*). Workable for demo but production should use JSONB or normalized child tables.

nodes.label: In-Memory Interview Sessions
nodes.rationale: Active sessions held in process-local _sessions dictionary. Multi-worker Uvicorn can cause inconsistency. Highest-risk migration area.
